title: swarmclawai/swarmclaw

summary: Local AI coding assistant for macOS with voice commands, vector memory, and Gemini-style surgical editing.

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: personal AI runtime, local-first. MCP bridge giving Claude Code 170+ tools (LSP, debugger, terminal, git) inside VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or JetBrains. Optional Patchwork layer adds YAML recipes, an approval queue, and an oversight dashboard. Your models, your machine, your policy. (Mac & Windows)

title: hyhmrright/StockAI

title: hydropix/TranslateBooksWithLLMs
summary: Translate full-length books and documents with Ollama, OpenAI (comptatible), Gemini, Mistral, Poe or OpenRouter. Preserves formatting. Resumes where you left off. No file size limits.
